original_image_tags: The page is a typed form with some fields filled in. The paper appears slightly aged. There are two hole-punch marks at the top center. The text is typewriter font. Some items like "N/S" are heavily struck through or appear as bolded overstrike characters.

elements.description: Typed incident summary sheet with numbered fields 1 through 25, containing handwritten and typed entries for an observation in Abilene, Texas on 1 Jan 48. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts are visible.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts, only typed/handwritten text on a form.
